sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6151" key="a)/mfoisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄμφ-οισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀμφι-φέρω</etym>) <sense id="n6151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revolving figure,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:682:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">682.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφ-οιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">described by revolution,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:682:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">682.8</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
